title: AGENT_HANDOFF event payload
description: Payload for AGENT_HANDOFF ledger events. Carries the full AgentHandoff artifact produced at an inter-agent output boundary crossing. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) requires every boundary crossing be captured as a first-class ledger event with the complete artifact embedded; the ledger alone must answer what crossed, from whom, to whom, and under whose auditor authority. Invariant 1 (Authority) is preserved at the artifact level: AgentHandoff.non_authoritative_flag is hard-coded true and handoffs cannot confer binding authority on their payloads.

agent_handoff.description: Full AgentHandoff artifact as defined in /shared/artifact-contracts/v2/AgentHandoff.schema.json. Validated separately by the AgentHandoff schema at emission time.
